name: Baja Seafood Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fish; fillets cut into 1-inch pieces
6 oz Crabmeat; Frozen (thaw and remove cartilage)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 6-quart Dutch oven, cook and stir onion, green chiles, and garlic in olive oil until the onion is tender.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients except seafood.
3. Bring to a boil and reduce heat. Simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
4. Add clams; cover and simmer until clams open, about 5 to 10 minutes. Discard any unopened clams.
5. Carefully stir in shrimp, fish, and crabmeat. Return to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer covered until shrimp are pink and fish flakes easily with a fork, about 4 to 5 minutes.
